computation_name: Weighted MinHash for Generalized Jaccard Similarity
definition: Use consistent weighted sampling, BagMinHash, ProbMinHash, or related weighted MinHash sketches to estimate generalized Jaccard similarity for real-valued nonnegative feature sets, then retrieve and rerank candidate train neighbors.

scale_profile.best_for: Large weighted bags or abundance profiles where binarizing features would discard important weights.
scale_profile.typical_upper_bound: Millions of sparse weighted sets when sketch size is chosen for the needed variance.
scale_profile.avoid_when: Negative features or signed embeddings are required; use cosine/MIPS methods instead.

tunable_parameters.name: weighted_minhash_variant
tunable_parameters.purpose: Selects CWS, ICWS, BagMinHash, ProbMinHash, or another implementation.

quality_gates: Compare approximate weighted Jaccard to exact weighted Jaccard on a subset.
Report how zero, missing, and negative values were handled.
Retain enough sketch size for the spectral thresholds of interest.
failure_modes: Weights with extreme dynamic range can dominate collisions.
Binarizing weighted features silently changes the scientific similarity definition.
Sketch variance can blur narrow SPECTRA bins.
example_usage: python weighted_jaccard_topk.py --train train.csv --eval eval.csv --out pairwise_similarity.csv --feature-col weighted_terms --top-k 50

citations.title: A Review for Weighted MinHash Algorithms
citations.evidence: Reviews weighted MinHash algorithms for estimating generalized Jaccard similarity of weighted sets at large scale.

citations.title: BagMinHash - Minwise Hashing Algorithm for Weighted Sets
citations.evidence: Introduces BagMinHash as an efficient minwise hashing algorithm for weighted sets.
